what: Neural pipeline scored on papygreek-fold-orig-v2 (the diplomatic FORM layer of papygreek-fold-v3; same sentences and gold).
protocol: greek.use_neural_pipeline(); CPU sequential (canonical); gold tokenization; official CoNLL-2018 evaluator; one-shot after the 0.44.0 fold rebuilds (leaf-APOS cc->appos converter correction + per-fold gold repairs); greek.evaluate_on_papygreek(layer='orig'); fold papygreek-fold-orig-v2 (sha d920a0cd...); vs v1: the same 73 leaf-apposition DEPREL cells corrected cc->appos
vs_v1: UPOS/XPOS/UFeats/lemma/UAS byte-identical to the v1 measurement; LAS 77.64->77.61. The reg/orig pair still differs only in the FORM column, so the orig-vs-reg deltas (the cost of raw documentary usage) are unchanged in kind: lemma -4.33 remains the headline
